headlines.title: Thira, an AI startup founded by Apptio co-founders to develop AI agents that handle back-office tasks such as IT support, raised a $21M seed led by Madrona (Todd Bishop/GeekWire)
Feathery, which develops an AI operating and decisioning system for financial services, raised $30M in total funding, including a recently completed Series A (FinTech Global)
Japan plans to buy 27,500 Nvidia Rubin chips to develop a domestic AI foundation model for robots, in a Noetra-led effort that includes SoftBank, Sony, and NEC (Bloomberg)
TSMC posted record $40 billion revenue. Its stock fell 4%. Investors are no longer buying the AI spending story on faith.
Data infrastructure startup Cribl acquires CardinalOps, which offers AI-powered threat detection tools and had raised $40M, sources say for around $100M (Meir Orbach/CTech)
The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
Whatnot acquires Madrona-backed AI startup Shaped to boost live shopping recommendations
The code AI forgot: logcat.ai raises $2.55M to put agents to work on device operating systems
Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)
London-based Risk Ledger, which helps organizations manage supply chain cyber risks, raised a £24M Series B led by Axiom Equity, taking total funding to £33.8M (Ionut Arghire/SecurityWeek)
Sources: China's National AI Industry Investment Fund gained voting rights in DeepSeek by joining its $7.4B round; other investors like Tencent and JD got none (Bloomberg)
Applications close in 48 hours — here’s everything Australian founders need to know about Stripe x Startup Battlefield
Intuit scrapped its own AI agent architecture twice in four months. At VB Transform 2026, its AI VP called that the fast path
Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
Nuclear startup Valar Atomics in talks to raise new funding at $6B valuation
Brex built its AI agent policy by watching what agents actually do, not by writing rules first
AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
A French startup built a radiology viewer from scratch with AI at its core. Moffitt Cancer Center is already using it.
Google used Veo and Gemini to reconstruct the greatest goal Pelé ever scored, which was never filmed
Apple raised iPhone 17 prices by 10% in Japan as the yen hovers near a four-decade low
Spanish satellite startup Sateliot wants €150 million to beam 5G directly to smartphones from orbit
Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
Apple overtakes Nvidia to reclaim the title of world’s most valuable company at $4.88 trillion
The Week’s 10 Biggest Funding Rounds: No Summer Doldrums As Dollars Still Flow To AI
